title: linum usitatissimum f. angustifolium
intro: Linum usitatissimum f. angustifolium, a variety of flaxseed plant, is a flowering plant known for its slender leaves and blue flowers. This plant is rich in omega-3 fatty acids and has been used for centuries for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Linum usitatissimum f. angustifolium include reducing inflammation and improving heart health, as well as supporting skin and hair health. Herbal preparations of this plant include flaxseed oil, flaxseed meal, and flaxseed capsules, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
